mapper.sql: select id, money, channel_id, channel_pay_rate, type_code, open_level_min, open_level_max from t_pay_channel_money
mapper.insert:
insert into t_pay_channel_money
money, channel_id, channel_pay_rate, type_code, open_level_min, open_level_max,
#{money}, #{channelId}, #{channelPayRate}, #{typeCode}, #{openLevelMin}, #{openLevelMax},
mapper.delete:
delete from t_pay_channel_money where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: select distinct pcm.money from t_pay_channel_money pcm inner join t_pay_channel pc on pc.id = pcm.channel_id and pc.status = 1 and pc.type = 1 inner join t_merchant_pay mp on mp.id = pc.pay_platform_id and mp.status = 1 and mp.is_rechange = 1 where pcm.type_code = #{typeCode} and pcm.open_level_min <= #{vip} and pcm.open_level_max >= #{vip} order by pcm.money

select pcm.channel_id from t_pay_channel_money pcm inner join t_pay_channel pc on pc.id = pcm.channel_id and pc.status = 1 and pc.type = 1 inner join t_merchant_pay mp on mp.id = pc.pay_platform_id and mp.status = 1 and mp.is_rechange = 1 where pcm.type_code = #{typeCode} and pcm.money = #{money} and pcm.open_level_min <= #{vip} and pcm.open_level_max >= #{vip} ORDER BY RAND() LIMIT 1

select pcm.channel_id from t_pay_channel_money pcm inner join t_pay_channel pc on pc.id = pcm.channel_id and pc.status = 1 and pc.type = 1 inner join t_merchant_pay mp on mp.id = pc.pay_platform_id and mp.status = 1 and mp.is_rechange = 1 where pcm.type_code = #{typeCode} and pcm.money = #{money} and pcm.open_level_min <= #{vip} and pcm.open_level_max >= #{vip} order by pcm.channel_pay_rate desc LIMIT 1

select pcm.channel_id from t_pay_channel_money pcm inner join t_pay_channel pc on pc.id = pcm.channel_id and pc.status = 1 and pc.type = 1 inner join t_merchant_pay mp on mp.id = pc.pay_platform_id and mp.status = 1 and mp.is_rechange = 1 where pcm.type_code = #{typeCode} and pcm.money = #{money} and pcm.open_level_min <= #{vip} and pcm.open_level_max >= #{vip} order by pcm.channel_pay_rate asc LIMIT 1
mapper.sql: from t_pay_channel pc inner join t_pay_type pt on pt.id = pc.pay_type_id inner join t_merchant_pay mp on mp.id = pc.pay_platform_id and mp.status = 1 and mp.is_rechange = 1 where pc.status = 1 and pc.type = 1 and pt.code = #{typeCode} and #{money} >= pc.recharge_min and #{money} <= pc.recharge_max and pc.open_level <= #{vip} and pc.open_level_max >= #{vip}
mapper.select:
select pc.id
order by pc.pay_rate asc LIMIT 1

select pc.id
order by RAND() LIMIT 1

select pc.id
order by pc.pay_rate desc LIMIT 1
